hooks.command: cat >/dev/null || true; repo_root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$repo_root/Tools/Invoke-CodeReviewGraph.ps1" update --skip-flows || true
cat >/dev/null || true; repo_root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$repo_root/Tools/Invoke-CodeReviewGraph.ps1" status || true
